name: LGF Bookings
upgrade_notice: Booking items system: manage extras per booking; itemized IN invoice lines.

sections.description: WordPress-native hotel CRM with calendar, bookings, guests, Invoice Ninja integration, and GitHub-based updating.
sections.changelog:
• 1.9.2.06: New booking items system — add/remove named extras (dinners, drinks, etc.) on the booking detail page. Included as individual line items on IN invoices. Items total feeds into booking totals. DB version 18.
  • 1.9.2.05: Line items show quantity=nights and cost=nightly rate. TVA 10% at invoice and line-item level.
  • 1.9.2.04: Invoice line items now show quantity = number of nights and cost = nightly rate.
  • 1.9.2.03: Fix: always set product_key on invoice line items so room name and description appear.
  • 1.9.2.02: Version bump.
  • 1.9.2.01: Block invoice creation if IN products are missing. Pre-select TVA 10%. Include product notes.
